name: D2 Editorial Grid
description: Warm off-white archive paper with a faint grid, serif Chinese headlines, rust accent, and monospaced metadata. Best for knowledge management, agent workflows, and documentary explainers.
descriptionZh: 暖白网格纸面、宋体大标题、锈红强调、等宽 metadata，适合知识管理、AI coding、Agent 工作流、文档系统和概念解释类视频。
